title: Lifetree Frosted Window Film Privacy Opaque Glass Film for Glass Windows Non-Adhesive Static Cling Frosting Film for Home and Office 44.5x200 cm
features: Privacy Protection: Enjoy 96% privacy. Our window film creates a secure personal space, shielding you from prying eyes and distractions outside – whether it's passers-by, dogs, or untidy surroundings. Yet it still lets in plenty of natural light, turning any room into your own private retreat, day or night

A Bright & Beautiful Space: Say goodbye to heavy, costly curtains and upgrade to our sleek frosted design. Made from waterproof vinyl, it’s practical and easy to clean – while brightening up any room. You won’t have to choose between privacy and natural light. Get the same effect as curtains, without the gloom. It’s the ideal way to maintain privacy without casting a gloom over the room

UV Protection & Anti-Glare: The window film privacy blocks up to 96% of harmful UV rays, helping protect your eyes and prevent furniture and floors from fading. It also reduces glare while letting in plenty of natural light, so you can enjoy a brighter, healthier indoor environment

No Glue & Easy to Fit: Thanks to its static-cling design, our mirror film is simple to install and leaves no sticky residue. It’s perfect for renters and homeowners alike, and works on any smooth glass surface—at home, in the office, or in classrooms. Thanks to its static-cling design, you can wipe it clean and reuse it again and again. Need guidance fitting it? We’re here to support you anytime

Installation Recommendations: Remember to remove the protective backing film; Spray plenty of water before applying the film; For larger windows, we recommend two people for a smooth installation; Use a damp cloth wrapped around a squeegee to remove bubbles; Trim any excess film and wipe away moisture for a clean finish
